name: Laura
subject: dropping the ball
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We've got just hours left until primary day, and we're at serious risk of missing our $50,000 match goal, team.
Everyone from Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ to _The Washington Post_ has reported that Democrats HAVE to win in Nevada if they are going to have a chance to take back the Senate - and right now **we 're dropping the ball at the worst moment possible.**
Thankfully, a group of generous donors has offered to match every dollar given before primary day tomorrow - but time's running out, and we're looking at a serious budget shortfall.
If we miss this goal, we _will_ be on track to lose this race - **so we 're counting on you to give right now and have your gift doubled to beat Trump's candidate and turn Nevada blue to take back the Senate: **
**[Please, give $5- before our critical midnight deadline - and have your gift go twice as far toward flipping Nevada blue so we can take back the Senate!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7e3/4fbb2af3/70da6540/5e8a7082/245443866/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azcxMS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk711-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Battleground Update
subject: we're not exaggerating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
We know our emails have been a little panicky lately, but we're not exaggerating when we say that Joe's chances of winning in November are no better than a coin flip. Here are 5 reasons why we're worr |
---

| | **Special interests and super PACs are lining up to defeat Joe!
[But we can hold them off with grassroots power. Pitch in >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c218b/7377f838/3c5e4f13/51f93d48/1220357833/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-beatsuperpacs?refcode=20180611.2nd&amount=10")** Peter,

We know our emails have been a little panicky lately, but we're not exaggerating when we say that Joe's chances of winning in November are no better than a coin flip. Here are 5 reasons why we're worried:
1. Rep. Braun's latest financial filing shows he spent **_$6,000,000.00_** in the primary, which doesn't even include the last few weeks before the election!
2. The Kochs have funneled more than **_$6,000,000.00_** through dark money groups to smear Joe's record on Indiana's airwaves.
3. Karl Rove's super PAC has already dropped **_$700,000.00_** on attack ads.
4. **Mitch McConnell 's super PAC has been spending big for months to defeat Joe,** because McConnell knows Rep. Braun will be a yes vote on every piece of McConnell's agenda.
5. **If we don 't have the resources to fight back, we'll lose Indiana's Democratic senator and end up with someone who thinks it's his job to serve as a copy machine for President Trump!**

We don't have to match all this spending dollar-for-dollar if we can run a first-class organizing operation to reach every voter in the state. **Will you chip in to help us beat the special interests and super PACs and send Joe back to the Senate?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c218b/7377f838/3c5e4f13/51f93d4b/1220357833/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-beatsuperpacs?express_lane=true&refcode=20180611.2nd&amount=10")**

Team --

Last week Trump stood on the White House lawn and said "Representative Lou Barletta, who -- hopefully, Lou Barletta will be your next senator from the great state of Pennsylvania." We're never going to get a shout-out from the White House lawn to boost our campaign donations, so we need to match that strength in other ways.

Thankfully, we just got word from some of our donors, and they're going to match every online donation up to $15,000.

It's never been more important to invest in Bob's campaign. Republicans are coming after the Affordable Care Act, Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security -- we can't lose a single Democratic vote with this much on the line.

name: Gus Kenworthy
subject: Did you get the memo, Derek? Our special event is ON 📧
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
On June 25th, the DNC Is hosting an LGBTQ Gala in New York City. I'll be there, and I want you to join me. Enter for your chance to win:
---
I distinctly remember how I felt before I came out in 2015 -- scared that I would lose friends, sponsors, and my fair chance at an Olympic gold medal. But I actually gained a lot from coming out as gay.

My family, friends, and fans all backed me up. I felt completely free for the first time in my life, and a few months ago, I became one of the first openly gay men to compete in the Olympics. Now I'd like to give back.

I'm partnering with the Democratic Party to support elected officials who fight for people like me. On June 25th, I'm headed to the DNC's LGBTQ Gala in New York City, and I want you and a friend to join me -- no matter if you're an ally or a member of the LGBTQ community.

**Chip in $3 and you'll automatically be entered for a chance to attend with a friend -- the DNC will send you two tickets to the gala, cover your hotel and travel, and you and I will even get to take a photo together.**

**[ ENTER TO WIN](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c3d/4067b0a/64614a324/7fbb7e5f/4151917425/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lgbtq-gala-donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER+TO+WIN&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gk_s4&source=em_20180612_gk_s4&refcode=em_20180612_gk_s4")
** As a member of the LGBTQ community, I want to make sure that we elect representatives who care about us and fight for equality each and every day. That's why I am so excited to attend the gala and hear from rockstar keynote speakers like Virginia Delegate Danica Roem and Massachusetts Attorney General Maura Healey.

Will you join me? If you enter to win, the DNC will cover hotel, travel, and gala tickets for you and a friend -- so you can just sit back and enjoy the event.

**[Chip in $3 to be automatically entered for a chance to attend the LGBTQ Gala and meet me.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c3d/4067b0a/64614a324/7fbb7e5c/4151917425/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lgbtq-gala-donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+ma&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gk_s4&source=em_20180612_gk_s4&refcode=em_20180612_gk_s4")**

Good luck!

Gus

Gus Kenworthy
Olympic Medalist

P.S. -- This is your chance to attend the DNC's LGBTQ Gala and meet me! **[All you have to do is chip in $3 and you'll be automatically entered to win.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c3d/4067b0a/64614a324/7fbb7e5d/4151917425/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lgbtq-gala-donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+All+you+have+to+do+is+chip+in++if+consin&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gk_s4&source=em_20180612_gk_s4&refcode=em_20180612_gk_s4")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c3d/4067b0a/64614a324/7fbb7e5a/4151917425/VEsC/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gk_s4&source=em_20180612_gk_s4&refcode=em_20180612_gk_s4").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c3d/4067b0a/64614a324/7fbb7e5b/4151917425/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gk_s4&refcode=em_20180612_gk_s4").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c3d/4067b0a/64614a324/7fbb7e58/4151917425/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gk_s4&refcode=em_20180612_gk_s4"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c3d/4067b0a/64614a324/7fbb7e59/4151917425/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gk_s4&source=em_20180612_gk_s4"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by **06/15/18.** Enter by contributing **[here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c3d/4067b0a/64614a324/7fbb7e66/4151917425/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lgbtq-gala-donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gk_s4&source=em_20180612_gk_s4&refcode=em_20180612_gk_s4")** , or click **[here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c3d/4067b0a/64614a324/7fbb7e67/4151917425/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/2018-lgbtq-gala?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gk_s4&source=em_20180612_gk_s4&refcode=em_20180612_gk_s4")** to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to New York City; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; two (2) admission tickets to LGBTQ Gala on Monday, June 25, 2018; ground transportation to and from the airport at the Destination and ground transportation to and from the LGBTQ Gala; Opportunity to meet and take photograph with Gus Kenworthy. Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to **[Official Rules](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c3d/4067b0a/64614a324/7fbb7e64/4151917425/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/content/2018-lgbtq-gala/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gk_s4&source=em_20180612_gk_s4&refcode=em_20180612_gk_s4")** and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.
clean_body: On June 25th, the DNC Is hosting an LGBTQ Gala in New York City. I'll be there, and I want you to join me. Enter for your chance to win: I distinctly remember how I felt before I came out in 2015 -- scared that I would lose friends, sponsors, and my fair chance at an Olympic gold medal. But I actually gained a lot from coming out as gay. My family, friends, and fans all backed me up. I felt completely free for the first time in my life, and a few months ago, I became one of the first openly gay men to compete in the Olympics. Now I'd like to give back. I'm partnering with the Democratic Party to support elected officials who fight for people like me. On June 25th, I'm headed to the DNC's LGBTQ Gala in New York City, and I want you and a friend to join me -- no matter if you're an ally or a member of the LGBTQ community. Chip in $3 and you'll automatically be entered for a chance to attend with a friend -- the DNC will send you two tickets to the gala, cover your hotel and travel, and you and I will even get to take a photo together. "" As a member of the LGBTQ community, I want to make sure that we elect representatives who care about us and fight for equality each and every day. That's why I am so excited to attend the gala and hear from rockstar keynote speakers like Virginia Delegate Danica Roem and Massachusetts Attorney General Maura Healey. Will you join me? If you enter to win, the DNC will cover hotel, travel, and gala tickets for you and a friend -- so you can just sit back and enjoy the event. "" Good luck! Gus Gus Kenworthy Olympic Medalist P.S. -- This is your chance to attend the DNC's LGBTQ Gala and meet me! ""

name: The White House
subject: ‘Complete denuclearization of the Korean Peninsula’
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=45122ba20f9388a851e6e9ee08f205ed1a3a6fbdd12adfa9ac5c6f2b38e3b8a062d231ebd9a38a3a1ceb9fba860968893d3a49f0b6d0dd3a) The White House • June 12, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump has departed Singapore and will arrive at Joint Base Pearl Harbor Hickam in Hawaii later today. |
---
|

## 'Complete denuclearization of the Korean Peninsula'
**Overnight, President Trump led a historic summit** with North Korean leader Kim Jong Un. "We had a tremendous 24 hours. We've had a tremendous three months, actually, because this has been going on for quite a while," President Trump said. "I want to thank Chairman Kim for taking the first bold step toward a bright new future for his people."
**The two leaders signed a joint statement** that outlines such a future. Here is the key phrase: "President Trump committed to provide security guarantees to the DPRK [North Korea], and Chairman Kim Jong Un reaffirmed his firm and unwavering commitment to complete denuclearization of the Korean Peninsula."
**The statement also commits to reestablishing U.S. -North Korean relations**. "Nearly 70 years ago . . . an extremely bloody conflict ravaged the Korean Peninsula," President Trump said. "Yet, while the armistice was agreed to, the war never ended. To this day, never ended. But now we can all have hope that it will soon end. And it will. It will soon end."
**"Chairman Kim has the chance to seize an incredible future for his people** ," the President continued. "Anyone can make war, but only the most courageous can make peace."
[See the joint statement signed by President Trump and Kim Jong Un.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=45122ba20f9388a896e8b385581ad4f3e4d7ed58208901dcbb91d151422a0389078add862ad360de25a3deb8d64e04127807211c4275a607)
**Watch** : [President Trump meets Chairman Kim for their historic summit. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=45122ba20f9388a8f4b07b646e809a46a24c744f8b2ef0370435a74a5c7119f086c46742aa694a1190db62634e1ce9dea55c6c563542ea15)

---
|

## 'The public health crisis of our time'
**"Our nation is facing a severe epidemic: opioid abuse and overdose**. This is the public health crisis of our time," writes Dr. Robert Redfield, Director for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, in an [op-ed this week](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=45122ba20f9388a8f669a7110a8e6a6548bfd891222182155746c353fcdcc37bd71c702592f72dee65873669bcf4bc148b74b570bad423f0). "Since 2000, this epidemic has claimed more than 300,000 lives and devastated even more families."
**First Lady Melania Trump reminded Americans who the most vulnerable victims are**. Neonatal abstinence syndrome "occurs when babies are exposed to opioids or other addictive drugs during pregnancy, and then experience painful withdrawal symptoms during their first few weeks of life," the First Lady said in a statement. "It is our responsibility to do all we can to ensure our most vulnerable are protected."
[Learn how the First Lady's 'Be Best' initiative is prioritizing struggling children. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=45122ba20f9388a80587e846aa42917f8b2a0fc6d67d35303c8145775848377feb83a9f2e20b63342f176273cba4c1d8c5ff3b566a555dbd)
**More** : [The White House's new ads to fight opioid abuse among young people ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=45122ba20f9388a82cdf78410ee70de5a29f02e4e8a2110f9a4ffa941878d45d3376bb88254db82d628be6ab88da15cbff58e3107cb4b37b)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump meets with North Korean Leader Kim Jong Un** | June 12, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=45122ba20f9388a83209f9ff35d060c21c3c80de4da276fb1c0c18b4346e429b61ae012010dbef4bd3b96eedfb4a2cee263c3cca9e1a67ef) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=45122ba20f9388a824d6146ca85a679094c2e958517e708f20eea17d58b4e431d524e8d40bbb125fde927137bef5ee1e30bdf7ca231dfec2) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d443339ac0ad246ca8de332eecf54443c60eec483e9f6db84e6350af7c0365ad4957afd43715fce7eefdbf17e00a6335fb8ceb138c097198c0)
---

name: Elliot Hecht
subject: We’re counting on you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friend,

Too many politicians rely on big corporate donors to fund their campaigns -- and to shape their policies.

Mel believes that elected officials should be held accountable by people in their districts, not corporations and special interests. That's why he's pledged to reject all corporate PAC donations.

[**This campaign is powered by supporters like you -- not corporate special interests. That 's why we mean it when we say we're counting on you. Pitch in $5 now to help Mel defeat the special interests and flip this district blue.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uva_tg6yWe8Ky1qJDQG_gKGcMebNflsRVXiAdsO4nus=/StioqEgEYr9cgHEomzTOaKqhSK8A24Jya_-hiFnBpMM=?refcode=em180612)

Our opponent, Jackie Walorski, has accepted nearly half a million dollars from corporate PACs and special interest groups.

It shows in her political agenda: Jackie was an architect of the GOP tax bill that gave massive tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans and encouraged companies to ship jobs overseas, while making middle class families pay more.

Mel's priorities are shaped by the people he wants to represent in Congress: priorities like protecting Social Security and Medicare, expanding access to quality and affordable health care, and growing good-paying Hoosier jobs.

**In Congress, Mel will be accountable to you, not special interests. But first, he 's counting on supporters like you to fight our opponent's corporate PAC money and flip this seat blue. Contribute now:**

_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uva_tg6yWe8Ky1qJDQG_gKGcMebNflsRVXiAdsO4nus=/StioqEgEYr9cgHEomzTOaKqhSK8A24Jya_-hiFnBpMM=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em180612) [Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uva_tg6yWe8Ky1qJDQG_gKGcMebNflsRVXiAdsO4nus=/StioqEgEYr9cgHEomzTOaKqhSK8A24Jya_-hiFnBpMM=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em180612) [Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uva_tg6yWe8Ky1qJDQG_gKGcMebNflsRVXiAdsO4nus=/StioqEgEYr9cgHEomzTOaKqhSK8A24Jya_-hiFnBpMM=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em180612) [Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uva_tg6yWe8Ky1qJDQG_gKGcMebNflsRVXiAdsO4nus=/StioqEgEYr9cgHEomzTOaKqhSK8A24Jya_-hiFnBpMM=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=em180612) [Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uva_tg6yWe8Ky1qJDQG_gKGcMebNflsRVXiAdsO4nus=/StioqEgEYr9cgHEomzTOaKqhSK8A24Jya_-hiFnBpMM=?refcode=em180612)

subject: Tell Sessions –– no to his drug war
body:
Act now: Enough is enough.
| [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d1kQN/6/ty/r5cs/61a9Gi/rBh6DDgyh/P/P)
---
| [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d1kQN/s/t2/r5cs/61a9Gi/sCGpjkwION/P/P)
---
In his latest move, Attorney General Jeff Sessions has called for mandatory minimum sentences for drug offenses. This attempt to escalate the drug war and rollback the progress of the Obama Administration is where his punitive and destructive agenda must end.

The Drug Policy Alliance is the nation's leading organization fighting to end the war on drugs, and the policies that fuel mass incarceration and the overdose crisis._We are appalled by what Sessions is trying to do._

[Tell Sessions we will not accept his agenda to harm millions of people - sign our petition today.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d1kQN/v/t2/r5cs/61a9Gi/sZvOlfIbNV/P/P)

Sessions' long history of supporting ineffective and unjust punitive policies is based on fear, hatred and regressive drug war myths. DPA believes in advancing reform rooted in compassion and justice. And we need like-minded advocates like _you_ to stand with us.

[Sign our petition to tell him the drug war must end now.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d1kQN/z/t2/r5cs/61a9Gi/vWykuombC/P/P)

subject: [IMPORTANT] Please read -- primary update for VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ee/3e0906/650b1680/3e340992/1180066378/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&source=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day")

| | Today's the day, Virginia!

Across the Commonwealth (and in Maine, Nevada, South Carolina, and North Dakota), **people are heading to the ballot box to choose their 2018 general election candidates.**

[If you live in an area that's voting today, don't forget to head to the polls. (If you don't have a primary today, reach out to someone who does and remind them to get out and vote!)](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ee/3e0906/650b1680/3e340991/1180066378/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+If+you+live+in+an+area+thatrsquos+voting&utm_campaign=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&source=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day")

**These primary elections matter.** Not only does high Democratic turnout ensure we have strong, progressive candidates up and down the ticket - it also sends the message that our party isn't taking anything for granted in 2018.

[Tomorrow,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ee/3e0906/650b1680/3e340990/1180066378/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&source=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day") the fight to take back the House and Senate officially kicks off here in Virginia. [Help us make sure we're ready: Donate to Tim Kaine's 2018 general election fund today >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ee/3e0906/650b1680/3e340997/1180066378/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Help+us+make+sure+wersquore+ready+Donate&utm_campaign=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&source=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day")

Thanks for always standing with us,

_Team Kaine_

P.S. Remember, polls are open in Virginia [until 7:00 PM tonight.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ee/3e0906/650b1680/3e340996/1180066378/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+until+700+PM+tonight&utm_campaign=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&source=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day") [Double check your polling location online, then go vote!](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ee/3e0906/650b1680/3e340995/1180066378/VEsA/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Double+check+your+polling+location+onlin&utm_campaign=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&source=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day") | [**DONATE TO GENERAL ELECTION FUND**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ee/3e0906/650b1680/3e340994/1180066378/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+DONATE+TO+GENERAL+ELECTION+FUND&utm_campaign=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day&source=20180612_1_FR_TEAM_Primary-Day")

name: Peter Joffrion for Congress
subject: Say NO to Mo
body:
As this recent [AL.com opinion piece](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1389300/7579208/-1362586005?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODFjNjVhOS01OTZlLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMYuoQzxhjJNNlY9LXd_3bIasVOkMSdrXe4FV-msn8k=) points out, we can’t afford Mo Brooks in North Alabama. Mo is bad for our reputation, he’s bad for our citizens, and he’s bad for our future. Time and time again, Mo makes headlines for all the wrong reasons, and the people of this district are left to endure the consequences of his wrong-headed actions.
[WE DESERVE BETTER.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1389302/7579239/-1042528460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODFjNjVhOS01OTZlLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMYuoQzxhjJNNlY9LXd_3bIasVOkMSdrXe4FV-msn8k=&emci=d50d6639-496e-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6&emdi=c81c65a9-596e-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6&ceid=6984379&am=25&smartlinkdata=JmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20%3D&tknfa=aZbXF89tingTpMNMaWmzp01AtHhpcecCAz7SsQ1azL8%3D)
Peter Joffrion understands that the people of North Alabama deserve responsible, level-headed leadership that cares about everyone, not just a small base of supporters with the deepest pockets or the most extreme views. Peter knows that we have serious challenges to face, including our most pressing concerns about jobs, health care, and education. With Peter in Washington, we’ll be able to focus on the real problems that face our district and our country and work toward solutions that benefit all of us.
[SAY NO TO MO.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1389304/7579241/-1042528460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODFjNjVhOS01OTZlLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMYuoQzxhjJNNlY9LXd_3bIasVOkMSdrXe4FV-msn8k=&emci=d50d6639-496e-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6&emdi=c81c65a9-596e-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6&ceid=6984379&am=25&smartlinkdata=JmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20%3D&tknfa=aZbXF89tingTpMNMaWmzp01AtHhpcecCAz7SsQ1azL8%3D)
It’s time to reclaim our dignity in North Alabama by saying no to more of Mo. We’re tired of being embarrassed by his endless tirades. We’re tired of having critical issues for our district ignored while Mo rants on cable news and hides from his own constituents. Your [best donation today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1389306/7579244/-1042528460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODFjNjVhOS01OTZlLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMYuoQzxhjJNNlY9LXd_3bIasVOkMSdrXe4FV-msn8k=&emci=d50d6639-496e-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6&emdi=c81c65a9-596e-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6&ceid=6984379&am=25&smartlinkdata=JmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20%3D&tknfa=aZbXF89tingTpMNMaWmzp01AtHhpcecCAz7SsQ1azL8%3D) will help us bring real leadership to North Alabama in November.

Peter Joffrion for Congress
P.O. Box 2102
Huntsville, AL 35804
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d50d6639-496e-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6/c81c65a9-596e-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODFjNjVhOS01OTZlLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMYuoQzxhjJNNlY9LXd_3bIasVOkMSdrXe4FV-msn8k=&id=110339827&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: When, not if
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3058/9e00690/46059165/240227e0/2504777636/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG&source=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG")
Friends,

Today we remember the 49 lives we lost far too soon at the Pulse nightclub in Orlando two years ago.

After the tragedy, so many people vowed that as a country, we would take meaningful action to prevent that kind of sick, senseless violence from ever happening again.

But so far, our leaders have not done enough. They've failed to act strongly enough after Las Vegas, Sutherland Springs, and Parkland.

Too many Floridians have felt the unbearable pain of a horrific, avoidable attack -- to the point that our kids are learning nursery rhymes for lockdowns in school. It's no longer a matter of _if_ , but a matter of _when_.

We can no longer stay silent and fail another community. That's why as Governor, I will fight to pass legislation that will ban assault weapons and large-capacity magazines, strengthen and require universal background checks for all gun sales, close private sale loopholes, and so much more. I don't want my children to grow up in a world where gun violence is normal -- do you?

If we all come together and raise our voices, we can fight back against the gun lobby's stranglehold on our government and stop these senseless murders.

**[Stand with me today to support commonsense gun legislation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3058/9e00690/46059165/240227e3/2504777636/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-equal-gun-reform?gpsid=13_55_1168&source=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG&utm_campaign=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Stand+with+me+today+to+support+commonsen")**

Thank you,

Andrew

[Add your name](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3058/9e00690/46059165/240227e2/2504777636/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-equal-gun-reform?gpsid=13_55_1168&source=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG&utm_campaign=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3058/9e00690/46059165/240227e5/2504777636/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=4+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3058/9e00690/46059165/240227e4/2504777636/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG&source=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3058/9e00690/46059165/240227e7/2504777636/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG&source=em18_180611_Pulse_engg_gq_act_gun_AG")

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Join me in Milwaukee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Mark your calendar. |

---

Friend,

I want you to enter for the chance to meet me at an important lunch I'm hosting in Milwaukee, Wisconsin later this month.

After lunch, you and I will take a picture together so we can remember this terrific day forever. You can even bring a friend or a family member, and I'll cover your flight, your hotel stay, and of course the wonderful meal.

---
| **[All it takes is a contribution of at least $1 to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e12ca094b7a9c1aec2297c1aa0effa4b850ac2485d44bf5484a7d0542f74bcb497ed921b4f8b22b35d1127d7fb6c325f26a3efa51417e47c)** [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9f53be172915f082d70c043ec548ccd208a251cee6710fa7581e63217de537faca53557a6eff0cae3cff1de04473ec9998ebb1bc1f5bcab6) ** [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1070a33db4984fbbb102e54be10a21f51b31d9ab307955ef35adb0fb536b6d88e7e4818ee885c522a3ca1ff2ce4fc99bb4c50b7ecc14461e)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b8bb7f3d8af452b15fa23449c443f0c3dc6d1dd64000df0657fbe3e284d3530569526391b954b2d09d5c1be96b81db0d0622b94a95dc4ab9)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=376a9a776809020c3ed55f0f117b3a959cc65fe1dbb7d7c4ffaa16c953791d599cf17cebde0ed4aeb57a9b41a94a10d326df759d555cc532)** ** [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b82f3fcee62845081e6ea60c71f9ac34211cc52012109897c6a3904a6b3a20f6f4bb62b4a028e7f6a5d7029e89706ef300be440bad89ebf3)** You're what the core of my presidency is about. You're why I decided to walk away from my life in New York to Make America Great Again.

And, Friend, thanks to your support, we are getting the job done for our country.

That's why I'd love for you to be at this very important lunch I'm hosting.

**[All it takes is a contribution of at least $1 to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=07093e6c6a45f8e054e9c96832230efb71a78567f14be5787cca05798ced0350685b6bbea023e4e270eddb396011c068c67786dd40c62321)**

name: Austin Petersen
subject: Why I am pro-life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, When I was young, my parents met an expectant mother who was contemplating abortion. In an appeal to stop her from aborting her unborn child, they offered to adopt and raise the child if she were to carry it to term. Thankfully, she accepted their offer, and that is how my sister Jodi joined our family. I would like to be very clear about something: I am unabashedly pro-life and proud of it. So what’s the next step for the pro-life movement? [**DEFUNDING Planned Parenthood. For good. Add your name here if you agree >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/defund_planned_parenthood?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061218_prolife&n=1) I am so tired of being promised by so called “Pro-life Republicans” that we are going to defund Planned Parenthood and then failing to do so. When I am elected, I will do everything in power to eliminate 100% of Planned Parenthood’s federal funding. Friend, I’d love to get 500 people to sign this petition today and collect some new supporters. Can you please add your name and share the link with some of your friends? Here is the link: **[https://www.austinpetersen.com/defund_planned_parenthood](https://www.austinpetersen.com/defund_planned_parenthood?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061218_prolife&n=2)** Thanks, Friend! Austin Petersen

---

([www.austinpetersen.com](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061218_prolife&n=3))

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: Sen. Smith Wants to Fast-Track the PolyMet Land Swap…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=1)
---
Friend -- **We cannot let her!** Last Friday, Tina Smith attached her proposal to complete the PolyMet land swap to the unrelated 2019 National Defense Spending bill. _If the “Smith Amendment” is passed, it will allow foreign billionaires to pollute our waterways and make away with the profits._ The PolyMet projects are proxies of Swiss corporation Glencore. Here are some recent reports about the corporation Tina Smith wants to invite into our state:
* “Instead of negotiating in good faith with unions as representatives of the workforce, Glencore **tries to actively break unions**. In Australia, workers at Glencore’s Oaky North mine were locked out by the company for more than 230 days for resisting a plan that aims to replace permanent workers with contractors. Rather than making a fair offer, the company chose to lock out its workforce.” ([Source](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.industriall-union.org%2Fspecial-report-glencore-the-commodities-giant-with-no-soul&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=2))
* “Glencore has a long and dark history in relationship with tax authorities. Let us recall the company’s founder, Marc Rich, who already in 1983 was globally persecuted by US authorities because of tax fraud and trading with the enemy . . . Glencore has several subsidiaries located in tax havens such as Bermuda Islands [which] allows the group to shift profits and avoid taxes. . . The major producer of copper and cobalt is accused of **large-scale tax evasion**.” ([Source](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facing-finance.org%2Fwp-content%2Fblogs.dir%2F16%2Ffiles%2F2012%2F03%2Fstudy_glencore_summary.pdf&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=3))
* “[Marc] Rich **defied international trade embargoes** to do business with pariah regimes from across the political spectrum, including Iran during the hostage crisis, Libya under Ghaddafi, Chile under Pinochet, and apartheid South Africa. Rich also did deals with North Korea’s Kim Il Sung, Yugoslavia’s Slobodan Milosevic and the Philippines’ Ferdinand Marcos, and through convicted money launderer Gilbert Chagoury, with Sani Abacha in Nigeria.” ([Source](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.industriall-union.org%2Fspecial-report-glencore-the-commodities-giant-with-no-soul&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=4))
* “Glencore . . . stands accused of **profiting from child labour** in a mine in the Congo, and paying the associates of paramilitary killers in Colombia, following a Panorama investigation.” ([Source](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bbc.com%2Fnews%2F17702487&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=5))
* “Environmental breaches at Glencore also became a focus of attention in advance of the company's flotation, and the company's report contains 25 pages on the subject, including details of **four "significant" environmental fines** totalling about $780,000 in 2010.” ([Source](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.theguardian.com%2Fenvironment%2F2011%2Fsep%2F07%2Fglencore-fatalities-environmental-fines-record&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=6))

...and that’s not to mention that the man charged with overseeing environmental compliance is [Tony Hayward](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fblogs.mprnews.org%2Fstatewide%2F2011%2F07%2Ftony_hayward_to_oversee_environment_and_safety_at_glencore%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=7) the former leader of BP during the **Deepwater Horizon disaster**. Senator Smith wants us to trust the words and promises of these people, but we Minnesotans know better. [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dqoc5xCOR-Jg&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=8) **Can you contribute today to help Richard take this fight to Washington and ensure that our cherished Boundary Waters remain beautiful for generations to come?** [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=9) Thank you for your consideration, Painter For Minnesota
[http://www.painterminnesota.com/](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=10)
---
| [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRWPMinnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=11) [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRWPMinnesota&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=12) [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Frwpminnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=13)
---
Prepared and Paid for by Painter Minnesota
Painter Minnesota · PO Box 6780, Minneapolis, MN 55406, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.painterminnesota.com/unsubscribe?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=14).
You can also keep up with Painter For Minnesota on [Twitter](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRWPMinnesota&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=15) or [Facebook](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRWPMinnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=16).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fnationbuilder.com&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smith_amendment_fundraiser&n=17), software for leaders.

name: Ben Jealous
subject: FW: Let me explain why this request is so important, especially today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Did you see this?

| Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw this email from my good friend, Senator Bernie Sanders. **Two weeks from today, voters head to the polls -- let's finish this race strong.** [**Donate now to stand with Bernie Sanders and a better Maryland.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a653/7ab0e2c4/7f9f0ce4/349ba527/3601272412/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben?refcode=OHQ0612A") Thanks, Ben \----- ORIGINAL MESSAGE -----
Sender: Bernie Sanders
Subject: Let me explain why this request is so important, especially today [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a653/7ab0e2c4/7f9f0ce4/349ba527/3601272412/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben?refcode=OHQ0612A") Friends - In just a moment I am going to ask you to make a donation to Ben Jealous' campaign for Governor of Maryland. And while I know you may not be from that state, I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request is so important, especially today. With Donald Trump in the White House, it is more important than ever that we elect great governors all across this country. And in this election, it is our job not only to defeat Trumpism, but to do it by supporting candidates who offer a progressive vision and hope for where this country can go. And I am here to tell you that there are very few individuals I know -- running for any office -- who have the record of progressivism that Ben Jealous does. Now, Ben's primary is in less than three weeks and the polls show him with a slight lead. This wasn't always the case. But as the campaign has progressed and he's gotten his message to more and more people, his standing in the polls has improved. Now if we can get him the resources he needs to finish strong, I believe that he will win. But, like me, Ben doesn't rely on millionaires and billionaires for money. His grassroots campaign is funded by lots of people giving small amounts of money. So, if he is going to see this through, it's going to take people like you helping him across the finish line. That is why I am asking you today: [**Can you make a $3 donation to Ben Jealous' campaign for Governor? He was there for our campaign when few were, and he can win if we're with him. Chip in today.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a653/7ab0e2c4/7f9f0ce4/349ba527/3601272412/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben?refcode=OHQ0612A") In his campaign, Ben Jealous is talking about health care as a right for every man, woman and child. He is talking about our broken criminal justice system and the absurdity that so many of our young people are unable to afford an education because of the income level of their families. He is addressing the global crisis of climate change and the need for real, comprehensive immigration reform. He is talking about the belief that a woman should be making the decisions about what happens to her own body. Ben Jealous is the former President of the NAACP and is someone who has been on the front lines of the struggle for racial justice, economic justice, environmental justice, and more. He was there for us as a leading surrogate on our presidential campaign when the financial and political establishment were fighting back hardest against us. Today, I want to be there for him. And if you'll join me, if we all come together and help Ben today, he is going to win in a few weeks. [**Can you make a $3 donation to Ben Jealous' campaign for Governor? Ben is a great progressive. He was there for our campaign when few were. He can win if you're with him. Chip in today.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a653/7ab0e2c4/7f9f0ce4/349ba527/3601272412/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben?refcode=OHQ0612A") One of the ways we can most effectively oppose Donald Trump's right-wing extremism is with strong progressive leadership at the state and local level. And there are few progressives stronger than Ben Jealous. Let's help get him elected. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders | [DONATE](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a653/7ab0e2c4/7f9f0ce4/349ba527/3601272412/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben?refcode=OHQ0612A")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a653/7ab0e2c4/7f9f0ce4/349ba526/3601272412/VEsA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a653/7ab0e2c4/7f9f0ce4/349ba521/3601272412/VEsB/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a653/7ab0e2c4/7f9f0ce4/349ba520/3601272412/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a653/7ab0e2c4/7f9f0ce4/349ba523/3601272412/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: Terrie Rizzo
subject: Two years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Team,

Two years ago today, we lost 49 people in the horrific Pulse nightclub shooting. At the time, it was the deadliest mass shooting in our nation's history, and we struggled to comprehend how such a violent act could happen.

But we've seen mass shooting after mass shooting ravage communities since then, including the massacre at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. Enough is enough, and Americans are organizing to finally address the gun violence epidemic.

[**I hope you still stand with me today and pledge to continue the fight to end gun violence in our communities. We must do everything we can to prevent another tragedy like Pulse.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/take-the-pledge-continue-the-fight-for-commonsense-gun-reforms?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+I+hope+you+still+stand+with+me+today+and&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1")

Last week, we were horrified to learn that Agriculture Commissioner Adam Putnam's office failed to review thousands of background checks for concealed weapons applications. This is yet another reminder that we are not doing enough to protect Floridians from senseless gun violence.

We not only need better laws to address gun violence, but we also need leaders who believe in researching, passing, and implementing commonsense gun reforms. We cannot keep electing people who are simply rubberstamps for the NRA or are only willing to offer thoughts and prayers.

[**I 'm proud of the work Florida Democrats and so many other groups have done recently to demand an end to gun violence -- but we have more work to do. Please join us today and pledge to continue fighting for gun reforms that will keep our communities safe.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/take-the-pledge-continue-the-fight-for-commonsense-gun-reforms?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+proud+of+the+work+Florida+Democr&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1")

Sincerely,

Terrie Rizzo
Chairwoman, Florida Democratic Party
[TAKE THE PLEDGE](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/take-the-pledge-continue-the-fight-for-commonsense-gun-reforms?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+TAKE+THE+PLEDGE&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1")
---
| |
---
We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters.

[Click here if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bed4/1a5213b3/6d543f3f/718ad4f9/3120568728/VEsC/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Click+here+if+youd+like+to+unsubscribe+f&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180612_1_1")

clean_body: | | Team, Two years ago today, we lost 49 people in the horrific Pulse nightclub shooting. At the time, it was the deadliest mass shooting in our nation's history, and we struggled to comprehend how such a violent act could happen. But we've seen mass shooting after mass shooting ravage communities since then, including the massacre at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. Enough is enough, and Americans are organizing to finally address the gun violence epidemic. "" Last week, we were horrified to learn that Agriculture Commissioner Adam Putnam's office failed to review thousands of background checks for concealed weapons applications. This is yet another reminder that we are not doing enough to protect Floridians from senseless gun violence. We not only need better laws to address gun violence, but we also need leaders who believe in researching, passing, and implementing commonsense gun reforms. We cannot keep electing people who are simply rubberstamps for the NRA or are only willing to offer thoughts and prayers. "" Sincerely, Terrie Rizzo Chairwoman, Florida Democratic Party "" | | We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. "" Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats! Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee Copyright Florida Democratic Party, All rights reserved.

name: Kenyarn Maxfield,
subject: Early voting starts tomorrow. Want to volunteer?
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff22/767134fb/5f63b596/433834e4/3723715322/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi Friend, I hope you're having a great week. I wanted to make sure you saw Rahsheim's note below. Maryland Early Vote starts next week, and we are looking for people to work the polls all over Prince George's County. **Donna needs our help more than ever to become the next Prince George 's County Executive. [Can we count on you to volunteer as a poll worker? ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff22/767134fb/5f63b596/433834e5/3723715322/VEsE/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer")** Kenyarn Maxfield Field Director Donna Edwards for Prince George's County Executive P.S. Donna would not have gotten this far without grassroots support. If you have a moment, [watch this video](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff22/767134fb/5f63b596/433834e2/3723715322/VEsF/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ApWVWUWJLlU&feature=youtu.be") featuring members of the Prince George's County community talking about why they support Donna's bold vision. **\------Forwarded Message------** Dear Friend, Prince George's County voters will choose their next County Executive in just a few weeks. I'm going to be honest with you: Donna's race for County Executive will be a close one, and she needs your help now more than ever to win the election. Big developers and corrupt officials have had control of our politics for too long. That's why Donna is running -- as county executive, Donna will put the working families and their children first, and she will put policies in place to enable every resident to thrive. Donna will make big developers pay their fair share. Donna is the best person for the job, but she can't win this election alone. **This Friday marks two weeks before the June 26th Maryland Primary Election, and Early Vote starts tomorrow. [Will you help Donna by sign up to volunteer as a poll worker?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff22/767134fb/5f63b596/433834e5/3723715322/VEsC/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer") ** Donna is not only a champion for working families but a concerned resident of the Prince George's County community. Her vision for our county includes improving education, keeping our streets safe, taking care of our seniors and increasing pay for low-wage workers. We're growing a movement made up of teachers, municipal leaders, workers, and community members coming together to help make her vision a reality, and to ensure our county has the leadership it deserves.**[ I hope you will join Team Donna and sign up to volunteer in the weeks leading up to the June 26th primary. ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff22/767134fb/5f63b596/433834e5/3723715322/VEsD/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer")** Thank you for your support, and for all the work you do. Let's build a better Prince George's County together. Rahsheim Wright Campaign Manager Donna for Prince George's County Executive
---
|
---
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff22/767134fb/5f63b596/433834e3/3723715322/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/donnafernedwards/") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff22/767134fb/5f63b596/433834e0/3723715322/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/donnafedwards") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff22/767134fb/5f63b596/433834e1/3723715322/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/donnafedwards/")

name: Josh Hawley
subject: The #resistance is all in for McCaskill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
Does that really sound like Missouri to you? While Senator McCaskill desperately tries to pretend she’s a moderate, her far left voting agenda has clearly pleased members of the #resistance crowd - so much so, in fact, that **a San Francisco based group dedicated to “fighting the Trump agenda" phone banked for her last weekend.**
Why do they support McCaskill? In their own words, they are proud that she voted "NO on the confirmation of Gina Haspel as CIA director,” and they say that re-electing McCaskill is "key to building a Democratic US Senate majority.”
Does that really sound like Missouri to you?
[ HAD ENOUGH? SUPPORT JOSH HAWLEY ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=593c904a3f35474ba36c03dad5fe4f78&_e=Bdps3UqVrS-OHYCzR75r3-1VJetNmrtZUgm77vRBaxVGK_Us-6KysQWnzgLli0_jxlqB7jukRK7zWpEQee9bw07dOxXO1SeorTfVpnxmDT4XjIT7QAioe2d7TIUpRm6YVsk-Ufp95HX01IejV0jtEaPreQ4sKD5rTb8hyg2C0OpuZZndsHgOGPYR6bG265h05Z0jAKwxhIazM-6laUwYboMLOTVXL4Qx2xWpmeWa2f07xvm-LNSi-Q29OQ0UqTqHYy74bR44F3lwaeeY5knAY10RLh6yyis63R7rxDu7xvUibU8ASJa1y-mWqJx9H5eF85I1yGuTr5Aa5XMTOGWrVVrW3j4m5CyZYfc-sd1t8u3hs50BKc15wrCSPtqxOaijqj22q9yT11IQ5EljEGaO_g%3D%3D) Senator McCaskill likes to pretend that she puts her constituents above her party, but anyone who looks at her voting record knows that she is in Washington to do one thing: **obstruct President Trump and Republicans, regardless of what Missourians want.**

Senator McCaskill has ignored us for too long. name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Climate: one year later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

This month marks one year since the U.S. withdrew from the international climate agreement. Back then the United States joined Nicaragua and Syria as the only countries that refused to take part.

**Now we are the only country in the world that 's not participating in this historic agreement and it's unacceptable.**

I was so inspired by the movement that came together after the Administration's climate announcement last year. All across the country, we stood together -- universities and cities and states and businesses -- and said, _" If the President doesn't do it, we will."_

We can't stop our work to meet those climate goals. In the Senate I'm working to combat climate change and build a clean energy economy to power us into the future.

**Will you help me keep advocating for policies to take on climate change with a contribution today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Jeanie Forrester
subject: I honestly need your help with this
body:
Hi there Derek, Let me level with you...**the New Hampshire Democrats are outraising us because of out-of-state dark money**; and their entire federal delegation is pouring money into their coffers. We just don't have that _luxury._ Friday is the last day candidates have to file for federal or state elections up and down the ballot. I need to show our candidates that the NHRSC is strong and will have their backs from now until November and beyond. clean_body: Hi there Derek, Let me level with you...the New Hampshire Democrats are outraising us because of out-of-state dark money; and their entire federal delegation is pouring money into their coffers. We just don't have that luxury. Friday is the last day candidates have to file for federal or state elections up and down the ballot. I need to show our candidates that the NHRSC is strong and will have their backs from now until November and beyond. Honestly, I can't do that without you, Derek. I set a goal to reach by the end of the filing period on Friday afternoon. I want our candidates to know that we will be side-by-side with them as they door knock and meet voters, and that we will provide them winning resources around the clock. There are over 294,000 registered Republicans in our state and I need YOU and just 199 others to give an immediate $25 to ensure our candidates can win. That's easy! I plan on winning in November, but I can't do it without your dedication and continued support. Your friend, Jeanie Forrester Chairman | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ccd773804ade4345ba58c39fc7111b1f&_e=5Oo5qq_pwke9RqcsUUGtjuqkfM63K4PCJNY1sFqlV_a6aNcJPlQL-ENSD6CtR2NVZJLCqdGWpYzSix_-u3zmN28J2-ac7AG4hisCL_0hQJGUMBT4GXW2Mz4hISTEUg_6Hw0YJR50qLew6Mr8K26V-dIJug20LXlisHZiYZ8WtHf1-AO86UambiqrPwshxEjJtt7wOMJueZlEougrJxDd11LngURkvoU8_0ZikHB1N_rvM8FUlYBmLwFM-SYDos87v6U9W506jArFSBqvZ0c9uFb98g6h-N0tMdsArr4IiuZ0jLr6oqZd18KKbp0G38RFyK8Yzzd3nsAiUZmIV_v0ENtG_DEOJfrv89TxyI87GJzXkHwEvDx7x3OoZ8WU7_9r) that you care about? So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ccd773804ade4345ba58c39fc7111b1f&_e=5Oo5qq_pwke9RqcsUUGtjuqkfM63K4PCJNY1sFqlV_Y25avCs9PwjOJ0O_Eu1zN2V_YqkmNW0E8PqglMH1cB9M9gdVl9KJ74kljTz0S6y3R9oT4mi6zIIZB-ggwfKq2Vu40pGK1Coo262p-32I3aMJWhWHthipCD2KJhHmOwnSDJkBCqKeQfxGEFCxlYsiEnpVlpAI4PWBJ6Fwl1OAppcg0dSUklQ4T4mqwE1lfeeSrgIzHn9qaXIx5q--bjqy5t95PQjdIywjUA2qQsrmrcjHot0I6Gs3Eqo76qsbLiHKff8IaoG8kasTaZghkJ7mps4qFNy9ky_s4hiBT44dkA7P6L2wW1tTfpIRNDAtXTQefeMHseyt9wahXUcZaIW26U) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ccd773804ade4345ba58c39fc7111b1f&_e=5Oo5qq_pwke9RqcsUUGtjkkm-l77MhAkhI0n87buyFSs0g7J6KeJc04YADxSMY7adOwxs9h99-HpBwoFf1J9713pqrLBrN85FGzqf-Po-PHl3KXuAsrdAXmwU9jPl-kO_afmsPa2z91mTqDwLjaQVQ_KWx8qIu7Pudj12t6ZSxUrE-1BN5C8Vw_XgmwivIf_RNJ86wJ0PIC76oIRto1yOtDSLrqkvSKQxqWhZow8YMBfcp5QxvJmTaRSINwdEdkI6GWPohlncdX7_51_QKsNwg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ccd773804ade4345ba58c39fc7111b1f&_e=5Oo5qq_pwke9RqcsUUGtjgOQGkrBH3MyxF57DsgivnLAMhquFQ26hHMEN3z0IdJLE3tEtiSds0jL3DYde36xqzNF1JueO3nRgBgP7k4Ab4kBJQ9Hnly-pH3s19ZJ10bHdoXjGoOADaeuH8Gufve_93Nxs6hmhiqSnhGSevAG1zlDbdkqdvE07Bih-tcByJzTgj_80qyoWGthxL-gq7HaK3kc8l14TTtTCn5ozZ6uNx069hnAzi9lKKVPKGc7bKYNTjJuiSlLu4xWDbiUgeJ66A%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ccd773804ade4345ba58c39fc7111b1f&_e=5Oo5qq_pwke9RqcsUUGtjpx1b2jIgl53YfGYyQjnuF-mnuz9Udqa6yWyKFwRuYT1HxFNIBdiZIa9HSUOG_TzDnXfPIkpo9y7nbYgTOhMhiI1QutAMH6rH6S8hjyndKwvAvXade0pUOSMAD0lmp6IFU_-onOAOiZl8Aji3PAybyt3dH02fybryUlM7lbBCD-00x-16MtfmAxQdB8WC9oOzu9fmjI_pnhIjvpVUG62lzq6H7bMzBSUzpW7N-3o7L98D8GEe__TharEepx-VFMQ7g%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ccd773804ade4345ba58c39fc7111b1f&_e=5Oo5qq_pwke9RqcsUUGtjuqkfM63K4PCJNY1sFqlV_bhTvZcrRAku7jW4MEnIbkYMhPAgYKer8_zMlIR8sfFiamPJQ_myAJue35EP5eXndtGlA5Z1ADnirEwbIUtnll-q7ZvpGcOHYOB_lNExn8D03d8ewJjZ_imeTo57gO7BelqcY7W8dqIOXSzYyeu40C0qxbrbadG7-0fEbE0Q9zIjcNV6A-dt73xVr8ZEAAIEHFRyfoeaDNgZyQCkcqAuBa4AEgSXaVSvzu7uDgyVIcGV7v11J1dR8dkllkKOb-h7laKSmIoHT_p0rIxDOFlJpb6eR-6-x8QJJF8jFWPyv2skfpdcHaPNTCgn7Inpd7fHsR8pvXHii4sirxJ0QCSIKUrD2xkfuK0RjC22dAbpT0I1g%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ccd773804ade4345ba58c39fc7111b1f&_e=2eQD-a4xz7AK7r_Mo8YKXO2iKjg5RBNePgy5Rl7VWB-thYm90HLqG70TxumGeyi_unq1T9SK89yd70rnz2F0zrq90hlcQknICssVoEf60ZakL_WwZ2dZQ3QIuQIGRDZjakVMKSKmffyMZzO3fqAzpMUxbQ7dFq7DbCpEm016CcCmhey_rGoiD2CAD5WJEffRYGIMhniNPMnIklCxc-rT_luHCjGwHbJWASkG9_A_PgVvg4p_Wd-nWvKdh5Gs2MEZ) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ccd773804ade4345ba58c39fc7111b1f&_e=2eQD-a4xz7AK7r_Mo8YKXO2iKjg5RBNePgy5Rl7VWB-thYm90HLqG70TxumGeyi_unq1T9SK89yd70rnz2F0zrq90hlcQknICssVoEf60ZakL_WwZ2dZQ3QIuQIGRDZjakVMKSKmffyMZzO3fqAzpMUxbQ7dFq7DbCpEm016CcCmhey_rGoiD2CAD5WJEffRYGIMhniNPMnIklCxc-rT_luHCjGwHbJWASkG9_A_PgVvg4p_Wd-nWvKdh5Gs2MEZ) to unsubscribe. clean_body: It’s President Donald Trump’s birthday in just a few days and I want to send him a card to show our support. I need you to sign it! Friend, It’s President Donald Trump’s birthday in just a few days and I want to send him a card to show our support. I need you to sign it! I know our President is working hard to make America great again, and it shows! More people have jobs, we all pay less in taxes, and we're finally restoring our place as a leader in this world. Let’s make this birthday the best one yet for our 45th President. Thank you, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

subject: Elections TODAY. Elections in 2 WEEKS. Elections NEXT MONTH.

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c46c5/24c69fd9/1a5785028/188162e0/3220419243/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER24N_digital_email_20180612_NextPrimaries_inact&source=WQEFER24N_digital_email_20180612_NextPrimaries_inact")
---

Peter,

There are **_20_** EMILY's List women on the ballot today in Maine, Nevada, Virginia, and a special election in Wisconsin.

But while we wait to find out if our women in primaries will advance to the general election and if Ann Groves Lloyd flips a Wisconsin state Assembly seat, we're also thinking about our next big election day -- June 26th.

We have seven women in Colorado, eight women in Maryland, and three women in New York on the ballot who are counting on the same support we've sent to Maine, Nevada, Virginia, and Wisconsin.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women keep winning at the ballot box.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c46c5/24c69fd9/1a5785028/188162e1/3220419243/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180612_email_NextPrimaries?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFER24N_digital_email_20180612_NextPrimaries_inact&source=WQEFER24N_digital_email_20180612_NextPrimaries_inact")**

There's been an election nearly every week in May and June. And this community hasn't missed a beat supporting dozens of candidates across the country.

That same energy is going to be critical as we head into the summer.

In July, two of our House women are on the ballot in run-off elections in Georgia. And 16 states hold primaries in August.

If we put in the work right now, we can help make sure our candidates keep winning all the way to November.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women keep winning:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Women-Keep-Winning](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c46c5/24c69fd9/1a5785028/188162e2/3220419243/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180612_email_NextPrimaries?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpWomenKeepWin&utm_campaign=WQEFER24N_digital_email_20180612_NextPrimaries_inact&source=WQEFER24N_digital_email_20180612_NextPrimaries_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

name: Osmack for Missouri
subject: Tell us your thoughts on Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri | P
body:
How do YOU think healthcare in the U.S. should change?
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qBpQ8zb7YvpmgRLmJ2vfUQmx-ALQ8OL5zq1n6q5yemaPJW33VZXM8gRN6ayvWM4hbGq95eMEe5V5lsXv5Vqic2zFxjq65l-L7uvXSjYAjeIQ930bOjAxoClkuGbAIehVW_QD6Twsyc-E2CcXNfVqM9bIFhGxH_O8S5T-1tNMHC5YepWI6kkUgEomvtmpcehgm-oCebR4o55tvcCvR1_YuQ==&c=4BsAEjKC006HjX_FwPFhecaY8_V7B9DmUG2Q4VMKqyuS6GoOAvuKqw==&ch=Zk9psNdr-Edkx3uq9Jke7AIId_bwEbXm2HHOqP5eBYc4AKoeuEUh9w==)
---
| We've all heard the stories. Premiums of $600, $800, over $1000 a month. Deductibles over $5000 or higher before insurance pays a single dime. A good friend of mine owns a wood shop business. He pays over $600 per month for insurance just for himself. His wife is over 65 and on Medicare...and she was forced to come out of retirement to take a low-paying cashier job to scrape together the cash to pay his premiums. [This is not right](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qBpQ8zb7YvpmgRLmJ2vfUQmx-ALQ8OL5zq1n6q5yemaPJW33VZXM8iQ4ErSlcuO7bxXzT74G4-Dd5fSY1qw6j7JAPCeTljuz8xLHIc-eux5OfpOLPGfKS4GTFs4aFXBYwzIi3tPVrs7sM1af9B1jdofFpaxafR1QJyQY7xPiPumwJQTuT8Hw1f7qykRA8FYctUMaDj2T-VQw0RGRugCr0UeegqZkaRZOxfZ_aNznHqg=&c=4BsAEjKC006HjX_FwPFhecaY8_V7B9DmUG2Q4VMKqyuS6GoOAvuKqw==&ch=Zk9psNdr-Edkx3uq9Jke7AIId_bwEbXm2HHOqP5eBYc4AKoeuEUh9w==).
The insurance companies have run the show long enough, and people are demanding change. That's why I support a Medicare for All system. Illness or injury shouldn't mean your family goes broke. Medicare for All will lower premiums and expand coverage to every American, regardless of income or pre-existing conditions.
---
| | | What direction would you like to see healthcare in the U.S. take?
---
| Introduce Medicare for All

| We want to know what you think about healthcare. Tell us what you think by voting in our polls. If you'd like to share your story about how insurance-controlled healthcare has affected you, send us an [email.](mailto:volunteer@markosmack.com)
---
| | | How important is healthcare to you compared to other issues?
---

clean_body: How do YOU think healthcare in the U.S. should change? | | | | | | == | We've all heard the stories. Premiums of $600, $800, over $1000 a month. Deductibles over $5000 or higher before insurance pays a single dime. A good friend of mine owns a wood shop business. He pays over $600 per month for insurance just for himself. His wife is over 65 and on Medicare...and she was forced to come out of retirement to take a low-paying cashier job to scrape together the cash to pay his premiums. ==. The insurance companies have run the show long enough, and people are demanding change. That's why I support a Medicare for All system. Illness or injury shouldn't mean your family goes broke. Medicare for All will lower premiums and expand coverage to every American, regardless of income or pre-existing conditions. | | | What direction would you like to see healthcare in the U.S. take? | Introduce Medicare for All == | | Reform the Affordable Care Act == | | Keep the Affordable Care Act == | | Unsure == | | We want to know what you think about healthcare. Tell us what you think by voting in our polls. If you'd like to share your story about how insurance-controlled healthcare has affected you, send us an mailto:volunteer@markosmack.com | | | How important is healthcare to you compared to other issues? | 5: Most important to me == | | 4: Important to me == | | 3: Somewhat important to me == | | 2: Not very important to me == | | 1: Not important to me at all == | | == is a bold progressive fighting for change. If elected, his first act in Congress will be to join the House Democrats who have already sponsored HR 676 (Medicare for All) and fight relentlessly to pass this bill into law. Mark is running in a suburban district much like those Conor Lamb and dozens of other Democrats have flipped since Trump took office. He's running against an unpopular, out of touch Republican incumbent who voted repeatedly to repeal the ACA and kick 24 million Americans off of their health insurance. subject: RSVP to join Ben and Cory Booker in Silver Spring:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
It's time to get out the (early) vote!

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a650/7ab0e2c4/7f9ec2b1/349ba52d/1700190599/VEsH/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScQ7U0NXzj4qqpQRbk7fuZnl_ODl1fvRlEan1tATJf4ekzaJg/viewform") Friend What's the best way to kick off early voting in Maryland? A rally featuring Senator Cory Booker in Silver Spring! **[RSVP now to join us on Thursday at Kaldi's Social House in Silver Spring.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a650/7ab0e2c4/7f9ec2b1/349ba52d/1700190599/VEsE/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScQ7U0NXzj4qqpQRbk7fuZnl_ODl1fvRlEan1tATJf4ekzaJg/viewform")** Here are the details: **What:** Early Vote Rally with Senator Cory Booker in Silver Spring **Where:** [Kaldi's Social House
918 Silver Spring Ave
Silver Spring, MD]() **When:** [Thursday, June 14
4:30 pm]() | [RSVP NOW »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a650/7ab0e2c4/7f9ec2b1/349ba52d/1700190599/VEsF/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScQ7U0NXzj4qqpQRbk7fuZnl_ODl1fvRlEan1tATJf4ekzaJg/viewform")
---
Early voting starts Thursday in Maryland, and we need everyone to help get out the vote -- including pretty busy senators like Cory Booker.
This primary will come down to every last vote, and we can't leave anything to chance. That's why Ben is so excited to get out his message with his good friend, Senator Booker.

Thanks,
Jerusalem

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: add your name before 7pm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Today's a big day - It's primary election day here in Nevada! We've come this far in our campaign thanks to your support.
For me, home has meant Nevada for nearly 40 years. It's where I met my husband and where we raised our daughter. It's where I worked my way up as a software developer in a male-dominated field, and where I've been fighting to make sure all Nevadans have access to the health care they need.

Today is a really important day in our race. It's an opportunity to show just how strong our campaign for U.S. Senate is. While Senator Heller has Mitch McConnell and right-wing Super PACs, I have supporters like you.

[**Before the polls close tonight, can you click here and add your name to say you 're with me as we work to flip this seat - and the Senate - from red to blue? **](https://secure.rosenfornevada. "https://petitions.signforgood.com/rosen-2018?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Frosen-2018-survey%2Fctrl%3Fcode%3Djtk751-p-nd")
Everyone from The Washington Post to Nate Silver reports that if Democrats want a chance to take the Senate back in November, we have to win here. I'm so proud of what we've already accomplished, but our race is going to be one of the closest and most competitive in the country - so we have a lot more work to do if we're going to repeal and replace Dean Heller in 147 days.
**[_Please, add your name right away to join me and show everyone watching that we 're fired up and ready to turn Nevada, and the Senate, blue._](https://secure.rosenfornevada. "https://petitions.signforgood.com/rosen-2018?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Frosen-2018-survey%2Fctrl%3Fcode%3Djtk751-p-nd")**
Together, we can win this. Thank you so much for being on our team.
Jacky
P.S. Since you're in Nevada, make sure you get out and vote today, if you haven't yet! Polls are open until 7 PM, and you can find your polling place [**here.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7f9/4fbb2af3/70d42afd/5e8a72a5/3341347968/VEsF/ "https://action.nvdems.com/page/content/voter/")

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7f9/4fbb2af3/70d42afd/5e8a72a2/3341347968/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7f9/4fbb2af3/70d42afd/5e8a72a3/3341347968/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7f9/4fbb2af3/70d42afd/5e8a72a0/3341347968/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.
Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible.
