subject: Deadline's in 280 minutes...
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | By now, you've probably heard that Trump attacked me (again) on Twitter. And you know that we set a goal to defend against his attack: **280 donors in 28 hours.** Well, we have about 280 minutes left until that deadline hits, and we're only 52 donors short of that goal. Defending our values isn't a job I can do all alone. It takes a team to build progress. **And when the attacks come in from President Trump or my five opponents, it takes a team to respond.** So one last time, before time runs out, I'm asking you to [**_click this link and give whatever you can. We're so close to this goal and I don't want to miss it: https://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/280donors_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f2f/622b7b5b/1b21fcbb/307b8176/3445035896/VEsH/ "https://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/280donors") Thank you! Debbie Sent from my iPad. Please excuse any typos.

name: Mike, Political Director
subject: dead even
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
To be truthful, the thought of another senator blindly executing the Trump-McConnell agenda makes my blood run cold. |
---

| | Peter -- Our race to keep Indiana's Senate seat in the hands of Hoosiers is **dead even**. That means even the smallest things will determine whether we win (and Joe keeps fighting for health care, Social Security, and working families) or lose (and President Trump gets his rubber stamp).

To be truthful, the thought of another senator blindly executing the Trump-McConnell agenda makes my blood run cold. **[If you feel the same way, I need you to dig deep and give whatever you can.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2196/7377f838/3c5826a2/51f93822/380558156/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyanne-attacks?refcode=20180612.1nd&amount=10")**

We have to protect Indiana's Democratic senator, Peter. The future of our state and our country depends on it.

\-- Mike | **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2196/7377f838/3c5826a2/51f9381d/380558156/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyanne-attacks?refcode=20180612.1nd&amount=25")**
---

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: breaking-news@joeforindiana.com
Subject: Kellyanne Conway says attacks on Joe coming...

**_"[KELLYANNE] CONWAY: TRUMP TO TARGET RED-STATE DEMS LIKE DONNELLY"_**
\-- _Roll Call_ , 6/6/18
Mike -- this week, President Trump's top advisor Kellyanne Conway said President Trump plans to ramp up his attacks on Democrats in red states as the midterms get closer... _and she named Joe specifically!_

Why is President Trump going after Joe? **Because he wants to replace Joe with Rep. Braun, who will rubber stamp the Trump-McConnell-Koch agenda, no questions asked!**

What does that agenda look like?
* More tax cuts for super-wealthy campaign donors on the backs of working Hoosiers
* Huge cuts to Medicare, Social Security, and HIP 2.0
* Pretty much anything President Trump and his allies want!

Joe is no one's rubber stamp. He always takes the time to carefully consider what's best for Hoosiers. But for Joe to take on people like President Trump, Karl Rove, and the Kochs, he needs this grassroots team to step up.

**And in the face of President Donald Trump 's attacks, we've never needed you more. Will you pitch in to help Joe fend off his attacks and BEAT Rep. Braun on Election Day?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Need 7 signers from 3264
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
It's officially been a year since President Trump announced his plans to withdraw from the historic Paris climate accord – and I'm more concerned than ever about the future of our nation and our planet.

The U.S. should be leading the fight against climate change. But instead, we're now the only nation refusing to sign on to the Paris Agreement.

This is a reckless, indefensible, flat-out dangerous decision.

Right here in the Granite State, President Trump's actions are already threatening our economy and our environment, jeopardizing our children's health every time they take a breath of air or a sip of water.

I'm fighting back against President Trump's destructive climate agenda and advocating for environmental protection, but I need to know that you're standing with me. Will you sign this petition to demand climate action? Join me on the frontlines of this fight by adding your name right now to tell President Trump to honor the Paris climate accord!

https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FCJSclimatechange%3Fcode%3Djtk856-ja-nd

Thank you,

Jeanne

--

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here:

http://www.democratsenators.org/o/23/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/?Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=45727

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Less than 150 days to go...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | We have less than 150 days until Election Day, 2018. This used to be an underdog race. Congressman Ted Budd was too entrenched. He had too many special interest allies. No one could beat him. **Not anymore.** Congressman Ted Budd has been cozied up to special interests for far too long. Speaker Paul Ryan's Super PAC has an office open in this district. The American Bankers Association has already started airing television advertisements on Budd's behalf. And that out-of-state special interest group, Club for Growth, who swooped in and spent half a million dollars to buy him this seat in 2016? They've already said they'll have his back again this time. Budd's stood strong against more affordable healthcare for North Carolina families, including voting to gut protections for those with pre-existing conditions. Budd's stood up for payday lenders, even though their predatory practices are illegal in North Carolina. And he's consistently stood up for big banks and corporate special interests over Main Street small businesses. **He 's standing up for everyone except North Carolina families. ** People across this district know this. They're ready for change. And we're well-positioned to give it to them. We've been thousands of miles across this district and our message of more affordable health care, quality education, and better-paying jobs is resonating. North Carolina families are tired of politicians who are consistently bought and sold to the highest special interest bidder. And I've said it from the beginning: _I won 't be beholden to anyone but the people of North Carolina. That's why I've refused to take corporate PAC contributions during this campaign. _ **If we keep up our momentum and continue spreading our message of bringing common sense back to Washington, we will win in November.[_We have an extremely important FEC goal at the end of the month, and we absolutely must hit our $50,000 goal. Help us get there by giving today._](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427876/e3b7d3/5cb656ec/2555d273/2623810836/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180612#")** | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427876/e3b7d3/5cb656ec/2555d273/2623810836/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180612#")
---
Thank you.
Kathy

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

No one could beat him. Not anymore. Congressman Ted Budd has been cozied up to special interests for far too long. Speaker Paul Ryan's Super PAC has an office open in this district. The American Bankers Association has already started airing television advertisements on Budd's behalf. And that out-of-state special interest group, Club for Growth, who swooped in and spent half a million dollars to buy him this seat in 2016? They've already said they'll have his back again this time. Budd's stood strong against more affordable healthcare for North Carolina families, including voting to gut protections for those with pre-existing conditions. Budd's stood up for payday lenders, even though their predatory practices are illegal in North Carolina. And he's consistently stood up for big banks and corporate special interests over Main Street small businesses. He 's standing up for everyone except North Carolina families. People across this district know this. They're ready for change. And we're well-positioned to give it to them. We've been thousands of miles across this district and our message of more affordable health care, quality education, and better-paying jobs is resonating. North Carolina families are tired of politicians who are consistently bought and sold to the highest special interest bidder. And I've said it from the beginning: I won 't be beholden to anyone but the people of North Carolina. That's why I've refused to take corporate PAC contributions during this campaign. If we keep up our momentum and continue spreading our message of bringing common sense back to Washington, we will win in November. "#" | | | "#" Thank you. Kathy | | | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress

name: Georgina Cannan
subject: This Supreme Court decision is really bad, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
By now you may have heard that the Supreme Court ruled in a 5-4 decision that Ohio can purge voters from voter rolls who haven't voted in two years. Let me explain what this means for 2018, 2020, and
---
By now you may have heard that yesterday the Supreme Court ruled in a 5-4 decision that the Republican secretary of state in Ohio can purge eligible voters from voter rolls who haven't voted in two years. Let me explain how this decision affects 2018, 2020, and future elections:

This ruling will embolden Republicans to remove millions more people from voter rolls across the country -- so we have to be laser-focused on voter registration this cycle. That means putting more organizers on the ground, working twice as hard to reach every single voter -- especially in communities of color -- and ramping up our efforts to educate millions of voters nationwide.

Campaigns and state parties are already working overtime to reach people before voter registration deadlines close -- and they need our help right now.

**Can I count on you to contribute $3 right now to help Democrats ramp up voter registration efforts across the country this cycle and beyond? This is the only way to ensure that millions of eligible voters across the country can cast a vote this year.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c58/4067b0a/644419680/7fbb43b5/2347147495/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohio-decision?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gc_gc&source=em_20180612_gc_gc&refcode=em_20180612_gc_gc")

[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c58/4067b0a/644419680/7fbb43b1/2347147495/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohio-decision?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gc_gc&source=em_20180612_gc_gc&refcode=em_20180612_gc_gc")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c58/4067b0a/644419680/7fbb43be/2347147495/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohio-decision?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gc_gc&source=em_20180612_gc_gc&refcode=em_20180612_gc_gc")
** Derek, protecting voting rights isn't just a messaging point -- it is a principle Democrats have worked and fought to expand for _decades_. Republicans have been trying to disenfranchise voters for just as long.

Now that the Supreme Court has granted Ohio legal grounds for voter suppression, other states will certainly attempt to follow up. It's quite literally up to us to make sure millions of people stay on voter rolls in the midterms and make it to the polls. So, I'm asking:

**[Stand with Democrats and make a $3 contribution right now to help campaigns and state parties ramp up their voter registration efforts. Any amount you can contribute will go a long way in protecting voters this cycle and beyond.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c58/4067b0a/644419680/7fbb43bf/2347147495/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohio-decision?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Stand+with+Democrats+and+make+a+if+consi&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gc_gc&source=em_20180612_gc_gc&refcode=em_20180612_gc_gc")**

Thanks for stepping up today,

Georgina

Georgina Cannan
Deputy Director and Counsel, Civic Engagement and Voter Protection
Democratic National Committee

P.S. Let me be perfectly clear about this: If we don't stand up for voting rights, we won't win elections. It's time for Democrats to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression tactics -- **[donate $3 right now to help register more voters.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c58/4067b0a/644419680/7fbb43bc/2347147495/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohio-decision?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+donate++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+max&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gc_gc&source=em_20180612_gc_gc&refcode=em_20180612_gc_gc")**

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c58/4067b0a/644419680/7fbb43ba/2347147495/VEsFAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gc_gc&refcode=em_20180612_gc_gc").

If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c58/4067b0a/644419680/7fbb43b8/2347147495/VEsFAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180612_gc_gc&source=em_20180612_gc_gc"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Jessica Morse
subject: 300,000 lives at stake?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/pa4yoMG8-vBoraZ3zUMkM1NZQ-AaXC2B3IWSliSGDik=/HuQgin9RQc0zTjb02XyEcZHN8OlMGg9sHQUh-ppqUtU=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180612_JM_preex_all_logo&recurring=auto)
Team, not 48 hours after we advanced to the general election last week, we got a stark reminder of the stakes in this race: McClintock's allies in the administration are fighting to let insurance companies go back to denying coverage to people with pre-existing conditions.

This means almost 300,000 people in our district could lose their coverage, or have to pay higher rates to keep it. It's a tax on being sick, and it's just plain wrong. I'll need your help to get to Washington and stand up to this nonsense--chip in now:

[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/pa4yoMG8-vBoraZ3zUMkM1NZQ-AaXC2B3IWSliSGDik=/HuQgin9RQc0zTjb02XyEcZHN8OlMGg9sHQUh-ppqUtU=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180612_JM_preex_all_15&amount=15&recurring=auto) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/pa4yoMG8-vBoraZ3zUMkM1NZQ-AaXC2B3IWSliSGDik=/HuQgin9RQc0zTjb02XyEcZHN8OlMGg9sHQUh-ppqUtU=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180612_JM_preex_all_25&amount=25&recurring=auto)

[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/pa4yoMG8-vBoraZ3zUMkM1NZQ-AaXC2B3IWSliSGDik=/HuQgin9RQc0zTjb02XyEcZHN8OlMGg9sHQUh-ppqUtU=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180612_JM_preex_all_250&amount=250&recurring=auto) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/pa4yoMG8-vBoraZ3zUMkM1NZQ-AaXC2B3IWSliSGDik=/HuQgin9RQc0zTjb02XyEcZHN8OlMGg9sHQUh-ppqUtU=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180612_JM_preex_all_other&recurring=auto)

Healthcare shouldn't ever be a partisan issue. Diabetes and cancer don't care whether you're a Democrat or a Republican. Our representative should be helping sick people get care--not taking it away from them. Yet Tom McClintock votes time after time to make healthcare harder to access--going so far as to vote repeatedly to repeal the Affordable Care Act entirely.

Let's make McClintock answer for it. Let's vote him out in November and send a message to leaders who sabotage healthcare--enough is enough.

In Congress, I'll work to make sure no American is shut out from the healthcare they need, especially if they struggle with a vulnerability like a pre-existing condition.

[Help me fight back by making a donation of $25 now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/pa4yoMG8-vBoraZ3zUMkM1NZQ-AaXC2B3IWSliSGDik=/jdkGnVEtsZprnQF_aprfTh_neS5oWHiAajGaLqIOWzs=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180612_JM_preex_all__l1&recurring=auto&amount=25)

Thank you,
Jessica

[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/pa4yoMG8-vBoraZ3zUMkM1NZQ-AaXC2B3IWSliSGDik=/HuQgin9RQc0zTjb02XyEcZHN8OlMGg9sHQUh-ppqUtU=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180612_JM_preex_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Democrat Donnelly & North Korea
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
With a historic agreement now signed between the United States and North Korea, let’s remember that when it mattered most, Democrat Joe Donnelly... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/democrat-donnelly-north-korea?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **President Donald Trump Signs Historic Denuclearization Agreement with North Korea**
_Reminder: Donnelly Was Against It Before He Was For It_
---
|
---
| | Friends,

With an historic agreement now signed between the United States and North Korea, let’s remember that when it mattered most, Democrat Joe Donnelly stood against President Trump and his work to make the world a safer place.

Last September, Democrat Joe Donnelly delivered a speech on the U.S. Senate floor criticizing President Trump for lacking a "clear strategy" with North Korea. The Indianapolis Star went as far as to call the speech a "[blistering critique](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9ad1107d03&e=1acd9bb3d6)."

_But yesterday, just hours before the historic summit, Donnelly flip-flopped his position...now saying he "supports President Trump and his administration's stated goal."_

He couldn’t support a strategy that was working with North Korea, but he was 100 percent behind Barack Obama’s failed Iran deal.

**No matter how much Democrat Donnelly tries to fool Hoosiers, we know the truth. Donnelly will say one thing when he thinks you aren't paying attention, and something else when the calendar turns to an election year. **

Let's make sure our fellow Hoosiers know that when it mattered most, Democrat Donnelly stood against the history-making agreement President Trump secured for the world last night. [Would you share this Facebook post to let your friends know about Donnelly's big flip flop?](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=effe8a158d&e=1acd9bb3d6)

We must show up in full force to the polls this November to elect Mike Braun, the candidate who will always support our president's agenda - not just when it's convenient for him.

Respectfully,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---
| [SHARE THIS NEWS ON FACEBOOK](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d1b46bbf45&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SHARE THIS NEWS ON FACEBOOK")

name: Tom Wolf
subject: I support equality. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Hello --

Being open about who you are can be a radical and crucial act.

That's why Pride Month is so important. Our society has made tremendous strides toward equality, but we still have a long way to go. And I want to make Pennsylvania a place that is open, diverse, and inclusive for all people. **[That's why I stand with the LGBTQ community and I hope you do too. Show your support of equality for all Pennsylvanians by sharing the image below on Facebook and Twitter:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec266/73a2bc12/3a3b7c2c/1fcdace8/365916553/VEsH/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/I-Support-Equality-Facebook?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+I+stand+with+the+LGBTQ+co&utm_campaign=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw&source=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw")**
| [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec266/73a2bc12/3a3b7c2c/1fcdacef/365916553/VEsE/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/I-Support-Equality-Facebook?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw&source=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw")
---

| [Share on Facebook ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec266/73a2bc12/3a3b7c2c/1fcdacee/365916553/VEsF/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/I-Support-Equality-Facebook?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=3+-+Share+on+Facebooknbsprarr&utm_campaign=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw&source=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw")
---
| [Share on Twitter ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec266/73a2bc12/3a3b7c2c/1fcdaced/365916553/VEsC/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/I-Support-Equality-Twitter?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=4+-+Share+on+Twitternbsprarr&utm_campaign=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw&source=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw")
---
As governor, I've been working to ensure that Pennsylvanians can love who they love and be who they are without fear. No one should ever be fired, denied a mortgage, or refused service at a hotel, library, or hospital, simply because of who they are or whom they love. That's why I'll continue fighting for equality as long as I serve the commonwealth.

It's important for us to take action, but it's also important for us to show support. We must stand in solidarity against division, bigotry, and inequality.
**So stand with me today and show that you support equality. Share the image on Facebook and Twitter:

[Share on Facebook ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec266/73a2bc12/3a3b7c2c/1fcdacec/365916553/VEsD/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/I-Support-Equality-Facebook?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=5+-+Share+on+Facebook+rarr&utm_campaign=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw&source=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw")

[Share on Twitter ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec266/73a2bc12/3a3b7c2c/1fcdac93/365916553/VEsA/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/I-Support-Equality-Twitter?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=6+-+Share+on+Twitter+rarr&utm_campaign=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw&source=em18_180612_pride_engg_gq_act__tw")**

In solidarity,

Tom

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Hello -- Being open about who you are can be a radical and crucial act. That's why Pride Month is so important. Our society has made tremendous strides toward equality, but we still have a long way to go. And I want to make Pennsylvania a place that is open, diverse, and inclusive for all people. "" | "" | "" | "" As governor, I've been working to ensure that Pennsylvanians can love who they love and be who they are without fear. No one should ever be fired, denied a mortgage, or refused service at a hotel, library, or hospital, simply because of who they are or whom they love. That's why I'll continue fighting for equality as long as I serve the commonwealth. It's important for us to take action, but it's also important for us to show support. We must stand in solidarity against division, bigotry, and inequality. So stand with me today and show that you support equality. Share the image on Facebook and Twitter: "" "" In solidarity, Tom Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

name: David Ortiz
subject: March in the Pride Parade with Gina!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
I wanted to invite you to march in the Pride Parade on Saturday with Governor Gina Raimondo. **[Click here to RSVP now!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0c8/5e076a9e/54582d88/144260d3/829886313/VEsH/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/s/march-with-gina-at-the-pride-parade")**
Now more than ever, it's critical that we stand in solidarity and support of Rhode Island LGBTQ+ community. **Meet us at the corner of Clifford and Dorance at 7pm on 6/19 -- we 're Group 18.** I look forward to marching with you then!
Thank you,
David
David Ortiz
Deputy Campaign Manager

\-------
###### Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.
###### Friends of Gina Raimondo

Providence, RI 02940

body:
This morning, the U.S. Supreme Court ruled in a 5-4 decision to UPHOLD Ohio Republicans' method of "purging" Americans for the state voter rolls. | |
---
Folks -- Monday's Supreme Court decision is a blow to voting rights, but Team Ryan sure isn't taking this defeat lying down! **In the past 24 hours, you've raised almost $2,000 for Kathleen Clyde and other voting rights champions (Average donation: $23). Can we get to $5,000 by the end of the day?** [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc0032/1506444541/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?refcode=em20180612_vpk_30&amount=23") [Electing Kathleen will put a stop to the Ohio GOP's shameful voter suppression schemes. Donate $23 or any amount to support Kathleen and our efforts to take back Congress >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc0032/1506444541/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?refcode=em20180612_vpk_30&amount=23") Thanks so much, \-- Tim
* * *
**PREVIOUS EMAIL:** Folks: This morning, the U.S. Supreme Court ruled in a 5-4 decision to UPHOLD Ohio Republicans' method of "purging" Americans from the state voter rolls. _The Wall Street Journal _says the decision is "in favor of conservatives," and "could allow purge of more Democratic-leaning voters." It's a victory for Ohio's Republican Secretary of State John Husted, who has tried every trick in the book to keep Democrats from voting. **Fortunately, we have an incredible Democratic candidate running for Secretary of State in Ohio: Voting rights champion Kathleen Clyde.** Electing Kathleen in November will be an enormous victory for those of us who believe in PROTECTING, not ATTACKING our sacred right to vote! [Fight back against the voter purge! Chip in $20.18 or any amount to elect Kathleen and support our efforts to elect leaders who will stand up for voting rights >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc0035/1506444541/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?refcode=em20180612_vpk_30&amount=20.18") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc0035/1506444541/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?refcode=em20180612_vpk_30&amount=20.18") [Contribute ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc0035/1506444541/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?refcode=em20180612_vpk_30&amount=20.18") Ohio's Republican Secretary of State John Husted instituted a policy of removing names from the state voter rolls if they don't vote in two years and don't mail back a specific voter card. **Let's be clear: This policy does _nothing_ for democracy -- all it does is keep more Americans from exercising their rights.** This policy deliberately penalizes young people, women, veterans, and working-class Ohioans who are more likely to change addresses or work long shifts that keep them from voting. Now, other Republican-dominated states will see this as a "green light" to institute their own ridiculous "use it or lose it" voting laws. **Let's stop this undemocratic trend TODAY -- support Kathleen Clyde and Democrats nationwide who will stand up for ALL of our right to vote:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Kathleen Clyde and Tim Ryan:_ [Express Donate: $3 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc0034/1506444541/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em20180612_vpk_30") [Express Donate: $10 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc0037/1506444541/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em20180612_vpk_30") [Express Donate: $25 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc0036/1506444541/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20180612_vpk_30") [Express Donate: $50 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc0039/1506444541/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20180612_vpk_30") [Express Donate: $100 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc0038/1506444541/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em20180612_vpk_30") [Or, donate another amount](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc003b/1506444541/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?refcode=em20180612_vpk_30") Thanks so much, \-- Team Ryan [Contribute ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc003b/1506444541/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?refcode=em20180612_vpk_30")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |

Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc003c/1506444541/VEsHAA/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc003f/1506444541/VEsHAw/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")

Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc003a/1506444541/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9288/5486deaa/2877b202/dcc003d/1506444541/VEsHDA/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20Sykes?=
subject: Celebrating Israel and America's Bond
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| **Peter,**
**True leadership brings peace through strength.**

**By their nature, politicians are weak and scared.**

Donald Trump is not a politician. I am not a politician. We need to LOAD the. Senate and House with men and women who know how to lead and are unafraid to use strength to find a peaceful resolve.

[By establishing our U.S. Embassy in Jerusalem](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=60abd241ff&e=9da9b0ca31), neighboring hostile radical elements in neighboring countries understand the sincerity of our resolve and application of our power in support of Israel.

Past presidents retreated and gave up Israel's ground when they placed the U.S. Embassy in Tel-Aviv. They showed Islamic nations that they were willing to give up God's Holy Land.

President Trump understands that Israel, God's Holy Land, is the foundation and anchor of our Judeo-Christian faith. Just as it is important to preserve and protect the Constitution and our own borders. It is also important to defend the sacred nation of Israel and God's Chosen People.

Send leaders who not only believe this, but have the strength and resolve to carry through and to continue to stand up and beside Israel in love and strength against a world determined to destroy it.

Courtland Sykes

name: Kenyarn Maxfield,
subject: Early voting starts tomorrow. Want to volunteer?
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff23/767134fb/5f649dca/4338338c/1576126073/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi Friend, I hope you're having a great week. I wanted to make sure you saw Rahsheim's note below. Maryland Early Vote starts tomorrow, and we are looking for people to work the polls all over Prince George's County. **Donna needs our help more than ever to become the next Prince George 's County Executive. [Can we count on you to volunteer as a poll worker? ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff23/767134fb/5f649dca/4338338d/1576126073/VEsE/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer")** Kenyarn Maxfield Field Director Donna Edwards for Prince George's County Executive P.S. Donna would not have gotten this far without grassroots support. If you have a moment, [watch this video](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff23/767134fb/5f649dca/4338338a/1576126073/VEsF/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ApWVWUWJLlU&feature=youtu.be") featuring members of the Prince George's County community talking about why they support Donna's bold vision. **\------Forwarded Message------** Dear Friend, Prince George's County voters will choose their next County Executive in just a few weeks. I'm going to be honest with you: Donna's race for County Executive will be a close one, and she needs your help now more than ever to win the election. Big developers and corrupt officials have had control of our politics for too long. That's why Donna is running -- as county executive, Donna will put the working families and their children first, and she will put policies in place to enable every resident to thrive. Donna will make big developers pay their fair share. Donna is the best person for the job, but she can't win this election alone. **This Friday marks two weeks before the June 26th Maryland Primary Election, and Early Vote starts tomorrow. [Will you help Donna by sign up to volunteer as a poll worker?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff23/767134fb/5f649dca/4338338d/1576126073/VEsC/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer") ** Donna is not only a champion for working families but a concerned resident of the Prince George's County community. Her vision for our county includes improving education, keeping our streets safe, taking care of our seniors and increasing pay for low-wage workers. We're growing a movement made up of teachers, municipal leaders, workers, and community members coming together to help make her vision a reality, and to ensure our county has the leadership it deserves.**[ I hope you will join Team Donna and sign up to volunteer in the weeks leading up to the June 26th primary. ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff23/767134fb/5f649dca/4338338d/1576126073/VEsD/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer")** Thank you for your support, and for all the work you do. Let's build a better Prince George's County together. Rahsheim Wright Campaign Manager Donna for Prince George's County Executive
---
|
---
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff23/767134fb/5f649dca/4338338b/1576126073/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/donnafernedwards/") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff23/767134fb/5f649dca/43383388/1576126073/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/donnafedwards") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff23/767134fb/5f649dca/43383389/1576126073/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/donnafedwards/")

name: Bob Casey
subject: Half of all Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66d5/51dbcc2a/69f7bf7/3a56651/1162388344/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

Take a look at this list, team:
| AIDS/HIV | Depression | Obesity
---|---|---
Alcohol abuse | Diabetes | Organ transplant
Alzheimer's | Drug abuse | Paralysis
Anxiety | Epilepsy | Paraplegia
Arthritis | Fibromyalgia | Parkinson's disease
Asthma | Heart disease | Pneumonia
Atherosclerosis | Hemophilia | Pregnancy
Cancer | Hepatitis | Renal failure
Cerebral palsy | Kidney disease | Sleep apnea
Congestive heart failure | Lupus | Stroke
COPD | Mental health conditions | Ulcerative colitis
Crohn's disease | Multiple sclerosis |

Before the Affordable Care Act was the law of the land, it was completely legal for insurance companies to discriminate against patients with pre-existing conditions like these. **The Trump administration is threatening that progress, putting insurance companies' bottom line ahead of patients' health care, and I won't stand for it.**

Half of all Americans under age 65 have a pre-existing condition -- we cannot go back to the dark days when they could be denied coverage and forced to pay astronomical costs out-of-pocket or go without care. It's just cruel.

Someone you care about has a pre-existing condition: maybe it's you, or your parent, your friend, your child. It's time to fight for them and their ability to access quality, affordable health care. We still have work to do to bring costs down, but we can't go backwards. We have to hold our ground and stand up for the millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions.

Thanks for being with me in this fight.

Bob

| Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180612_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: Want to help flip the Senate? Make sure you donate to Jacky today >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c46ac/24c69fd9/1a44d61b6/188115af/1845865981/VEsH/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFCR26N_digital_email_20180612_JackyPrimary_inact&source=WQEFCR26N_digital_email_20180612_JackyPrimary_inact")
---

Peter,

It's a big day for one of our candidates who can flip a key Senate seat!

Jacky Rosen is on the ballot in Nevada, where she's crossing a major milestone in her fight to defeat Dean Heller -- making it through her primary.

That also means today is your _last chance_ to donate to Jacky before new donation limits kick in for the general election.

**[Donate $3 to Jacky Rosen before the day is over-- 100% of your contribution will go straight to her campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c46ac/24c69fd9/1a44d61b6/188115a8/1845865981/VEsE/ "https://emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/jacky-rosen1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+Jacky+Rosen+before+the+day+i&utm_campaign=WQEFCR26N_digital_email_20180612_JackyPrimary_inact&source=WQEFCR26N_digital_email_20180612_JackyPrimary_inact")**

Dean Heller is widely considered one of the most vulnerable Senate Republicans this year.

He's the only Republican senator up for re-election in a state Hillary Clinton won in 2016.

And he made the woefully unpopular decision to cast the deciding vote to advance an Obamacare repeal bill last year.

Jacky has what it takes to defeat him. Last cycle, despite the millions of dollars the GOP spent against her, she flipped an open House seat from red to blue.

This year, she can do it again. With control of the Senate to be determined by just two seats, electing Jacky can help flip the Senate and put up a firewall against the Trump agenda.

**Donate $3 to Jacky today to make sure you can support her as much as possible this cycle -- 100% of your donation will go straight to her campaign:**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: The results are in...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

The results of Virginia's 7th District Democratic Primary are in, and in case you hadn't heard...

We won!

It's hard to put into words the the sense of excitement and gratitude I'm feeling right now. This collective achievement is the result of countless hours sacrificed by our volunteers, thousands of miles driven across the district, an incredible campaign staff working tirelessly to get our message out to voters, and much more. To everyone who supported our efforts and made tonight possible, thank you.

This campaign is by, for, and of those who are willing to put in the time, energy, and passion - because democracy is not a spectator sport and together, we are standing up for what's right. And tonight, as we celebrate a hard-earned victory, I commit to carrying that message through the next five months and into the halls of Congress next year.

The time for politicians who put party over people, special interests over thoughtful legislation, and extreme ideology over the needs of their constituents is coming to a close, and our team in the seventh is helping lead the way.

Make no mistake, we have a long road ahead and face an intense fight. But with everything that's at stake right now, we cannot let up. We must, and will work tirelessly to bring the accountable leadership to Washington that Central Virginians deserve.

I'm so incredibly appreciative of the support I've received, and I'm equally excited for the months to come.

Now let's go win this thing!

Sincerely,

Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4b5D_jkyio0ITl3TXoQNQYs13eqqRGRdqlDxLXfghAU=/7v0C_pl48lzcnrqI-LAzanMtYL6942IfAEtPdSejSzs=?refcode=victory)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4b5D_jkyio0ITl3TXoQNQYs13eqqRGRdqlDxLXfghAU=/xkw8VFQDQvg072yfSzFfaQGj6sePvQl5z5orixTi7GM=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/4b5D_jkyio0ITl3TXoQNQYs13eqqRGRdqlDxLXfghAU=/DvHlwKZR4VvYH2c1DlTSfYOapEBpxCttXnXwVhTIlpo=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4b5D_jkyio0ITl3TXoQNQYs13eqqRGRdqlDxLXfghAU=/UBMKMOysJgLy7KSGOHibMnDUg1oaiA2wPIS1_R7AVT0=).

Summer is almost here, and we're kicking this campaign into high gear -- for Joe, that means _a lot_ of marching in parades. With Independence Day just around the corner, there are plenty of great opportunities to get out there and show your support for Joe!

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: $85 billion merger -- approved today without conditions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
A federal judge just approved the Time Warner and AT&T merger with no conditions.
#
Peter -
A federal judge just approved the Time Warner and AT&T merger with **no conditions.**
This is an $85 billion deal that will create one of the largest telecom and media monopolies in our country. It will control the distribution and creation of an enormous amount of content.
This is a signal to giant corporations in every industry that the courts are willing to green light almost any vertical merger, and will doubtless lead to a rush to merge.
Common sense tells you that this degree of concentrated power isn't right. These giant mergers tend to hurt workers and democracy, not just prices--they lessen the control of the little guy.
Let me be clear: We got in this mess because for too long our leaders just refused to stand up to corporate consolidation and monopolies.
**New York's next Attorney General can lead the fight to stop this.** She can use antitrust laws already on the books to take on big mergers in tech, hospitals, insurance companies, agriculture, telecom and food distribution, and challenge the existing stranglehold of companies like Comcast and Spectrum. These laws exist because at one time we did restrain corporate power, and it's time we do it again.
You can be sure that I will do just this. But these wealthy and powerful interests will likely spend unlimited sums to stop that from happening. That's why I need you.
**[Make a $3 donation right now to send a message that you want to stop corporate consolidation and break up monopolies. I cannot do this without you.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e01/6e822e2f/1b61f47a/4172141e/2352916244/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTItZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-merger?refcode=em180612-full")**
Corporate consolidation is a major threat to our economy and our democracy. We've seen a record number of mergers in recent years, including more than 50,000 mergers in 2017. And if this trend continues, we're only going to see inequality worsen.
So why is almost no one talking about it?
Well you see, all of these giant corporations -- like Bank of America, United Airlines, or Monsanto -- they're political actors. They spend money to control our elected officials and then make the policy decisions that benefit their bottom line.
They don't just control our elected officials though. How often do you hear the corporate media talk about this issue? Not as often as you'd like. Some companies who benefit from this consolidation, like Time Warner, Spectrum and Sinclair Broadcasting, quite literally own the media.
The last strong antitrust movement was decades ago. Since then, both Democrats and Republicans have been far too willing to let these monopolies persist and grow. And now they are afraid of what these giant corporations might spend against their re-elections if they take a stand.
**Here's the thing: I'm not afraid of them.**
In fact, this has been one of my top issues for a long time now. I've spent years writing about it and organizing to stop it. We need to start naming names and reviving anti-monopoly politics. As New York's AG, this would be one of my top priorities.
But that means taking on some of our country's wealthiest and most powerful interests in this campaign.
**[If you want an AG who will fight corporate consolidation and monopolies, then we need you to chip in $3 right now. This is important. Together, we will win.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e01/6e822e2f/1b61f47a/4172141e/2352916244/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTItZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-merger?refcode=em180612-full")**
Thank you for helping us build a movement around anti-monopoly politics.
In solidarity,
Zephyr
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e01/6e822e2f/1b61f47a/4172141e/2352916244/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTItZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-merger?refcode=em180612-full")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e01/6e822e2f/1b61f47a/41721400/2352916244/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").
